name: Opus SoundBed
blurb: A full-body vibro-acoustic bed with transducers mapped to the body's energy centers — head, heart, belly, root, feet. Sound becomes something you feel in the bones, not just hear.

name: Shiftwave
blurb: The Shiftwave Pro is a zero-gravity chair with 18 transducers delivering pulsed pressure waves and guided breathwork — a 10-minute nervous-system reset trusted across pro sports.

name: Ammortal
blurb: The Ammortal Chamber stacks red & near-infrared light, PEMF, molecular hydrogen, breathwork, and vibro-acoustic sound into one reclined session — calm and energized at once.

name: VIBE
blurb: VIBE plays neurologically-tuned music through full-body transducers — low-frequency sound and vibration that calm and regulate the nervous system in a 20-minute session.
